_description: Warranty Tracker — warranty periods by service type, claim statuses, age thresholds, reporting

default_warranty.note: Apply these defaults when no service-specific warranty is defined.

oil_change.note: Covers oil consumption defect only; excludes external leaks.

brake_pads.note: Excludes pads worn by glazing from overheating or improper use.

battery.note: Pro-rated after 12 months. Requires load test failure for replacement.

tire_installation.note: Tire manufacturer warranty applies — not the shop's warranty.

ac_compressor.note: Void if system was not flushed and recharged at time of repair.

denial_reasons: Wear and tear beyond the warranty period
Non-related failure (part that failed is not what was warrantied)
Vehicle modified in a way that caused or contributed to failure
Maintenance not performed as required (e.g., oil changes skipped)

age_flag_thresholds.note: Flag any open claim approaching expiry at 30 days. Claims past expiry should be reviewed before closing.

documentation_rules: Every warranty claim must have a repair order number linked to the original service.
Photo-document the failure before any teardown.
Record the mileage at time of failure claim.
Retain parts replaced under warranty for 30 days in case supplier disputes.
